description: A cutout subject (creature/person/object) moves across a held background on a path.
whenToUse: A subject crossing a scene without a title (a creature moving, a walk-through) when NOT the opening hook.
generalize: The subject, its motion (glide/walk/drive/swim), the background, and the field are SLOTS.
produces: gpt-image-2 background + gpt-image-2 subject pose(s) -> rembg -> Traverse moves the cutout across.

subject.note: the moving subject + how it moves

styleLock: Background + subject are gpt-image-2 art; motion is the compositor's.
rules: Use title-trail-opening instead for the opening hook.
